text:
いやはや、おみごとおみごと。
始まる前はあんなに寒かったのに
今は逆に暑いぐらいだね。

でも、わたしたちぐらいの
レベルになったら、これぐらい
動き回って当然だよね？

さ、体が冷える前に
早いとこ帰還しよっか。

You sure don't fail to impress. And see, what
did I tell you? We were so absorbed in our
work that we didn't only forget the cold,
we beat it!

I guess that's just what we should expect from
ourselves at the level we're both at.

Let's go though, we don't want to hang around
and let the chill set back in.
